channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How the Slinky was discovered by accident in the 1940s
item.description: As the US marks its 250th anniversary, ABC explores how the Slinky became a beloved American toy.

item.title: JetBlue flight reports striking drone while landing at JFK
item.description: A JetBlue pilot reported a drone strike during approach to JFK Airport on Monday morning, according to the FAA.

item.title: Supreme Court expands presidential firing power, overturning 90-year-old ruling
item.description: The Supreme Court overturned a 90-year-old decision that allowed Congress to shield members of certain independent agencies from being fired by the president.

item.title: Americans’ pride in US history and democracy drops, and fewer are proud to be American, polls find
item.description: A new AP-NORC poll finds that Americans have grown less proud of the country’s history or the way its democracy works over the past several years.
